title: Senior Investment Banker at Kotak Mahindra Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Kotak Mahindra Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Kotak Mahindra Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Kotak Mahindra Bank:
Kotak Mahindra Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kotak Mahindra Bank!
